summary: Phase-35 (Release Gate) backend + frontend e2e tested. All 10 backend pytest cases PASS in 11.5s (no-email gate, list-strips-results, detail-200/404, RBAC 403 for client on all 3 endpoints). Frontend: qa-release-gate-card renders at top of landing, verdict='RELEASE READY' with last-summary '14/14 pass · 0 fail · 0 P0 fail', 2-step confirm/cancel works, email-toggle defaults ON & uncheck works, gate completes in ~5s with toast, history list updates with 4 entries (gate_id, READY/BLOCKED, X/total, timestamp, actor, duration). qa-gate-refresh re-fetches without flicker. ONE FRONTEND P1 BUG FOUND: qa-gate-details-toggle never renders after running a gate due to a state-overwrite race in ReleaseGateCard (see rca).

ui_bugs.issue: qa-gate-details-toggle accordion never appears because `last.results` gets nuked. In runGate() line 541 setLast(fullPayload-with-results) is called, then line 547 loadHistory() runs which overwrites `last` with the lightweight gates[0] (the list endpoint strips `results` via Mongo projection `{'results': 0}`). Net effect: the details accordion gated by `{last?.results && ...}` (line 636) is never rendered. Spec test #12 (P1) cannot be satisfied via UI.

action_items: Fix ReleaseGateCard so details-toggle stays visible after a gate run. Two clean options: (a) in runGate() call loadHistory() FIRST, then setLast(data) so the rich payload wins; or (b) inside loadHistory() preserve existing rich `last` (e.g. `setLast(prev => prev?.gate_id === data.gates[0].gate_id && prev.results ? prev : data.gates[0])`); or (c) when history loads, also GET /release-gates/{gates[0].gate_id} to fetch full results for the most recent gate.
OPTIONAL: register the `email` marker in pytest.ini/pyproject to silence PytestUnknownMarkWarning.
OPTIONAL: AdminQAPlaybook.jsx is now 824 lines (was 674). Continue split into ReleaseGateCard / AISuggester / AutomationPanel / RunView modules.
critical_code_review_comments: qa_automation.run_release_gate persists `payload` directly with `insert_one({**payload})` — Motor mutates the dict by adding `_id`. The function then does `payload.pop('_id', None)` before returning, which is correct, but using a shallow copy for insert would be safer and avoid implicit mutation.
list_release_gates uses `{'results': 0}` projection but does NOT exclude `_id`; the manual `r.pop('_id', None)` covers it, but a unified projection `{'results': 0, '_id': 0}` is cleaner.

Auto-trim logic in run_release_gate: `.sort('started_at', -1).skip(100)` then delete — this is correct but executes on every gate run; consider adding an index on `started_at` (currently unindexed) to keep this O(log n).
ReleaseGateCard `loadHistory` swallows errors silently (`/* silent */`). Should at least console.warn for prod debuggability.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_phase35_release_gate.py (new — 11 tests, 10 P0/P1 run by default + 1 email-marker opt-in)

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 in 11.5s; email-marker test deliberately skipped per spec)
success_rate.frontend: 92% (12/13 spec-listed flows pass; 1 P1 fails — details-toggle never renders)

seed_data_creation: Created ~5 release_gates rows during testing via POST /release-gate. All cleaned up at end via db.release_gates.deleteMany({triggered_by:/admin@propmanage.io/}) — remaining count after cleanup = 0.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview URL https://phased-document.preview.emergentagent.com. Sidebar TRAINING → 'QA Playbook'. Release Gate card renders at TOP of QA Playbook landing (above Run nou + Run-uri recente). On a fresh DB the verdict-banner reads 'Niciun gate rulat încă' (slate gradient) and qa-gate-last-summary is NOT in DOM until at least one gate has been persisted. Backend gate completes in ~5–6s with all 14 PASS. Email toggle defaults ON — always uncheck it before triggering a gate during automated testing to avoid hitting Resend with real emails. Cleanup db.release_gates after running tests. Run regression: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_phase35_release_gate.py -v -m 'not email'` (10 tests, ~11s).

200 with full results array of 14 items; unknown id returns 404

P0 verdict banner 'RELEASE READY' visible after gate persisted; last-summary='14/14 pass · 0 fail · 0 P0 fail'
P0 click qa-gate-run-btn → button swaps to qa-gate-confirm-btn + qa-gate-cancel-btn

P1 qa-gate-refresh → re-fetches history, state preserved (count stays at 4, no flicker observed)
rca of the issue: qa-gate-details-toggle missing — RCA: In /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminQAPlaybook.jsx, ReleaseGateCard.runGate() executes `setLast(data)` with the rich payload (line 541, data.results.length==14) and immediately calls loadHistory() (line 547). loadHistory() awaits GET /release-gates which STRIPS results via Mongo projection `{'results': 0}` in list_release_gates() (qa_automation.py line 686), then does `setLast(data.gates[0])` (line 530), overwriting the rich state with a results-less object. The accordion render gate `{last?.results && (...)}` at line 636 evaluates falsy → no details-toggle rendered. Reproduction: open /admin → QA Playbook → run gate → wait for completion → grep DOM for qa-gate-details-toggle → 0 matches. Mitigation (suggested in action_items): either reorder so setLast wins after loadHistory, or merge state (`setLast(prev => prev?.results ? prev : data.gates[0])`), or fetch the full detail of the latest gate in loadHistory.
